items.title: University of Arizona students boo Eric Schmidt’s AI cheerleading during commencement
items.summary: Former Google CEO Eric Schmidt delivered the commencement address at the University of Arizona on Friday. And, as his speech veered into talk of AI, he was repeatedly drowned ou...

items.title: Apple's new Siri app will reportedly offer auto-deleting chat options
items.summary: Users can choose between keeping conversations for 30 days, one year or forever, according to Bloomberg.
